title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.714 - Contents and form of buyer's guide
text:
376.714.  Contents and form of buyer's guide. — The life insurance buyer's guide shall consist of the following:

  (2)  The buyer's guide shall contain the following language at the bottom of page 2:
  (3)  The remaining text of the Buyer's Guide shall begin on page 3 as follows:
(L. 1979 H.B. 508 § 8)
